# lifeCycleState

**Instance Property**

Information about the state of the applet instance.

## Declaration

```swift
let lifeCycleState: Data
```

## Discussion

The format of the data in this property is defined in Table 11-4 of GlobalPlatform Card Specification 2.2.1, and the Mobile Secure Element specification from the [https://register.apple.com/login].
title: lifeCycleState
